product.name: ArDura 1000 C Rb
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny PA 6.6 — warianty powlekane, FR i wzmocnione
product.familyDescriptorEn: PA 6.6 fabrics — coated, FR and reinforced variants
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.
product.titleDescriptor: Pa6.6 woven ripstop fabric for military equipment
product.specLine: 300 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Ripstop Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArDura 1000 C Rb is heavyweight 100% polyamide 6.6 ripstop woven fabric for military equipment.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for military and police bags.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
Pa6.6 woven ripstop fabric for military equipment
300 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Ripstop Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>3000N; Weft>2500N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>300N; Weft>250N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
Allergenic Dyestuffs | Not Detected | EN ISO 14362-1

acceptedMatches.rationale: Multiple explicit statements directly identify the fabric as intended for military equipment and police/military use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: The fabric is explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471, the high-visibility safety standard, and tagged as hi-vis, though no dedicated hi-vis garment application text is provided.
Antibacterial property is present but no explicit medical or healthcare use is stated in the product data.
The category source group explicitly lists motorcyclists as an intended user group for this PA6.6 fabric line.
